problemSubhead: Ask AI to turn rough ideas into polished copy.
userQuestion: Help me write a catchy blog intro about AI writing tools.

aiAnswerBlocks.text: Here is a polished blog intro draft:

aiAnswerBlocks.title: Hook options
items: Stop staring at a blank page — let AI draft your first line in seconds.
From messy notes to publish-ready copy, without the writer's block.
Your ideas deserve better words. AI helps you find them faster.

aiAnswerBlocks.title: Suggested intro
items: AI writing tools are changing how creators work — not by replacing your voice, but by helping you start faster, edit smarter, and ship more often.

aiAnswerBlocks.title: Tone variants
items: Professional: Clear, confident, and ready for your audience.
Friendly: Conversational and easy to read.
Bold: Punchy hooks that grab attention in the first line.
